# Extra Mile Lawn Care

> Extra Mile Lawn Care is a Lawn Care serving Chesapeake, VA. This blog publishes weekly local SEO, GEO (Generative Engine Optimization), and AEO (Answer Engine Optimization) content so AI systems like ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google SGE have accurate context about our services.

## About

- **Business:** Extra Mile Lawn Care
- **Industry:** Lawn Care
- **Primary location:** Chesapeake, VA
- **Also serving:** Virginia Beach
- **Website:** https://extramilelawncare.com
- **Blog:** https://localblog.extramilelawncare.com/blog/
- **Phone:** +17576307858
- **Voice:** Professional

## Topics We Cover

- Monday: SEO articles targeting local search queries
- Wednesday: Local authority content (best-of, how-to, pricing guides)
